purpose: Track upstream refs known to build and currently pinned by default for pymc-repeater-console release builds.
status_note: These refs are current pinned release defaults and known-good candidates from review, not guaranteed by contract tests yet.

release_policy.release_builds: pin pyMC Repeater and pyMC Console refs to commit SHAs by default
release_policy.scheduled_or_dev_tests: may test upstream main but must not publish release images
release_policy.upstream_drift: must be detected and reported, not hidden by compatibility shims

pymc_repeater.verification_note: Updated from a36cb6af44ab63247dd6d0f414afc6e53de18012 because that commit did not contain upstream radio_type=pymc_tcp support and failed the wrapper build guard.

wrapper_contract_notes: No upstream source should be patched on disk.
Ingress path/base-url/header/WebSocket adaptation is allowed when response content remains upstream-controlled.
Local substitute APIs under upstream-looking /api routes are not allowed in normal operation.
If upstream does not provide /api/analytics routes, the wrapper must not fake them.
These refs are pinned by default for reproducible release builds.
They must not be described as fully contract-tested until contract tests exist and pass.
